daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but curious today, Taurus. There's a gentle pull toward trying something outside your usual comfort zone—trust that instinct. The universe is basically asking you to stay flexible while keeping your feet on the ground.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's real tenderness in the air. If you're with someone, a genuine conversation could deepen things. Single? Someone might catch your eye through a shared interest or vibe. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn.
daily.career: Your creative energy is firing on all cylinders today. That project or idea you've been sitting on? This is the day to pitch it or at least take one concrete step forward. Your natural magnetism is working overtime—people are genuinely drawn to your ideas.
daily.health: Your body's asking for balance today. Maybe that's a long walk, stretching, or just unplugging for an hour. You're naturally intuitive about what you need—don't override that gut feeling. Rest isn't laziness; it's maintenance.

weekly.overview: Your vibe this week is all about grounding yourself and releasing what no longer serves you. Mercury's energy is asking you to get real with your intentions. Trust that solid foundations are being laid for something meaningful.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, this is a week to have those conversations you've been putting off. Single? Someone's noticing your energy. Either way, authenticity is your love language right now—no performances needed.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that project or opportunity that's been sitting in your drafts. Your steady approach combined with fresh thinking is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for slow, intentional movement. Think grounding practices rather than intensity. This is your sign to actually rest without the guilt. Nourish yourself like you mean it.
